summary: Iteration 131: Menu Analytics feature tested - Backend 15/15 tests passed (100%), Frontend UI fully verified. Item Sales tab shows 4 stat cards, bar chart, pie chart, and ranked items table. Add-on Usage tab shows modifier stats with 60% adoption rate, bar chart, and 3 modifier category cards (sizes/addons/options). All filters and tabs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Menu analytics aggregation pipeline correctly groups POS order items by item_id
Category enrichment properly joins with menu_items collection for category labels
Modifier aggregation correctly separates sizes, addons, and options by group field
Adoption rate calculation: orders_with_modifiers/total_orders is accurate
Period filter regex validation prevents invalid input (422 for invalid periods)
Authorization correctly requires authenticated user for all 3 endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS orders data (25 orders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 131: Menu Analytics verified. Key data: 25 POS orders, 6 unique items sold, SAR 251 total revenue. Top seller: Chicken Shawarma (10 qty, SAR 125). Modifier stats: 1 'Regular' size used, 60% adoption rate (15 of 25 orders have modifiers field). Sidebar shows Menu Analytics under Stock section. Period filter supports today/week/month/year/all. Branch filter works but no branch-specific data tested.

menu_analytics_trends_api.details: Returns daily qty/revenue for specific item

elements: 4 stat cards (Total Items Sold, Menu Revenue, Unique Items, Categories)
Top Items by Revenue bar chart (recharts)
All Items Ranked table with 6 items
4 stat cards (Modifier Uses, Modifier Revenue, Adoption Rate, Total Orders)
Option Groups card (shows 'No options data yet')

filters.period_filter: Today, This Week, This Month, This Year, All Time
